notes: Phase 1 / Tier 14 list (Mogu'shan Vaults, Heart of Fear, Terrace of Endless Spring — Heroic versions). Tier token bosses: helm = Sha of Fear, shoulders = Lei Shi, chest = Grand Empress Shek'zeer, hands = Wind Lord Mel'jarak, legs = Amber-Shaper Un'sok. Five-piece Eternal Blossom (Restoration runs the tier legs too) with Kri'tak and the Fan of Fiery Winds. Draft compiled from the Icy Veins MoP Classic Restoration Druid gear guide (T14 table).
